payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was excluded because it is marked as superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would violate the supersession state.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new and filtered mem_old as superseded

entity_resolution.reason: The recall explanation concerns the same Sam associated with Goldman; no new durable identity information is being committed.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned for Sam from Goldman because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the recall query.
mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

details: Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or correct the supersession link.
If mem_new is inaccurate, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, add disambiguating entity metadata before relying on recall.
